working: sendToArtist: isLatest+nextExists guard — only creates next version when at latest with no next; sending old version switches active to latest
ProjectsTab undoStack: pushUndo(description, songId, snapshot, file) — covers audio_drop, overwrite, addFeedback, toggleFeedback, deleteFeedback, sendToArtist
ProjectsTab undo button: undo-tab-btn in mid-header, disabled when stack empty, ⌘Z via svelte:window
BrainTab undoStack: pushBrainUndo/undoBrain — deleteEntry saves full snapshot, saveApproved saves inserted id
BrainTab undo button: undo-tab-btn next to BRAIN ENTRIES toggle
DailyTab undoStack: pushDailyUndo/undoDaily — addTask and delTask push before mutating
DailyTab undo button: undo-tab-btn in tasks-header
notes: All three tabs now have independent undo stacks. ProjectsTab uses work_data snapshot restore. BrainTab restores or deletes brain_knowledge rows. DailyTab restores state.tasks array.
